summary: Tab restructuring testing completed successfully. All 6 tabs visible (Resumen, Tareas, Proveedores, Notas, Archivos, Semanal). Timeline, Presupuesto, Galería tabs correctly removed. Budget merged into Proveedores tab. Progress bar added to Overview. PDF dossier generation working in Weekly Summary.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed (same as previous iterations)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Tab restructuring complete and tested. 6 tabs: Resumen (overview with progress bar + countdown + quick stats), Tareas (list/kanban views with filters), Proveedores (merged Budget section at top + Suppliers section below), Notas, Archivos, Semanal (weekly summary with PDF dossier generation). Timeline, Presupuesto, Galería tabs removed. Key data-testid: overview-progress, budget-title, budget-totals, suppliers-title, new-budget-btn, new-supplier-btn, dossier-section, generate-dossier-btn, service-progress, pareja-tasks. PDF dossier uses jsPDF library and generates file named Dossier_{EventTitle}_{Date}.pdf.
